set.targetStrategy: Use HarmonyOS Cangjie Preferences as the direct replacement for Android DataStore boolean session persistence.
set.notes: Phase-01 wires the persisted login preference boundary to the Cangjie-callable Preferences API and uses it during EntryAbility startup inspection.

cangjieCallableEvidence: SDK declaration: C:/Users/Sieger/.cangjie-sdk/6.1/cangjie/api/modules/linux_ohos_aarch64_cjnative/ohos/ohos.data.preferences.cj.d declares Preferences.getPreferences(UIAbilityContext, String), Preferences.get, Preferences.put, and Preferences.flush.

Target implementation: login_preferences_service.cj uses PreferencesValueType.BoolData with file name user_login_state_pref and key user_login_state; app_ability.cj reads the same persisted flag during startup.

set.targetStrategy: Use HarmonyOS UIAbility lifecycle and WindowStage.loadContent as the startup shell replacement for Android Activity + SplashScreen lifecycle wiring.
